verification_evidence.check: PASS - _safe_resolve() iterates _ALLOWED_ROOTS; UNC prefix check covers //ccikrnf/wrkgroup; resolve()+relative_to() for non-UNC paths; ValueError on mismatch

PASS - //unknown/share/file.xlsx does not match any root; ValueError raised (returncode=1)
PASS - only order_lines_reader.py modified; no other files touched
PASS - no 3.10+ syntax used; List[Path] typing import already present
PASS - call site at lookup_order_lines uses _safe_resolve(file_path) without second arg
